Commercial: Pokémon Center.

Commercial: For better treatment of

Commercial: Where there is Pokétch,
there is joy.
DP.554.0005:
Commercial: Add to your smiles!
New Pokétch apps are available now!\f
Drop by the Pokétch Company
in Jubilife City today!

Pick a Peck of Colors Flower Shop.

Shift it up, down, all the way around!\f
For the latest in Bicycles, look up

Hearthome City Contests!

Visit the snowbound Snowpoint City!

GTS--the Global Trade Station--awaits

Team Galactic.
DP.554.0023:
Commercial: Find peace in our world!
Team Galactic.

DP.554.0026:
Commercial: If what you seek is the

DP.554.0027:
Commercial: Do you know the true

The doors are thrown open to

Every Trainer on the planet can

DP.554.0028:
